allow: Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('@phosphor-icons/react'\); Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => !k.startsWith\('__'\) && typeof icons[k] === 'function'\).filter\(k => /seal|award|medal|badge|stamp|ribbon|trophy|certif|verif|star|check|shield/i.test\(k\)\).slice\(0, 30\).forEach\(k => console.log\(k\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('@phosphor-icons/react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => typeof icons[k] === 'function'\); console.log\(keys.slice\(0, 30\).join\('\\n'\)\); console.log\('total:', keys.length\)")
Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('@phosphor-icons/react'\); console.log\(typeof icons, Object.keys\(icons\).slice\(0,20\)\)")
